_readme: Virality radar watchlist. ELIJAH edits freely. Per niche: 'wikipedia' = exact English Wikipedia article titles to track daily pageviews (precise velocity on known topics); 'gdelt' = phrases to track in global news volume; 'hn_keywords' = words that flag relevant Hacker News front-page stories (software/AI). Keep wikipedia titles EXACT (they must match real article names, e.g. 'Large language model'). A title that returns no data is logged in trend-report.md.

pop-culture-events._note: Pop culture moves too fast for a fixed list — add specific names/events/shows you want to track (exact Wikipedia titles). A 'Wikipedia top-views discovery' feed is a planned radar enhancement (see HANDOFF next-steps) that will surface breakouts you didn't name in advance.
